verses.text: Hih leitung-a mihingte tungah a man hetloin hong kibawlna ka phawk hi

Pasian in mi khatpeuh tungah neihlelam, hauhna, leh pahtawina pia-in, a deih khempeuh neisak napi-in, tua nate nuamtakin zangsak loin, midang khat in nopsaklawh laizang hi. Hih pen a mawknapi, a thuman hetlo khat ahi hi

Mi khat in ta za khat nei-in kum saupi zong nungta thei khading hi. Bangzahin sauveipi a nungta ahi zongin leitungah nopsakna ngahloin, limtaka vuina a ngah kei leh, a sisa-a suak naungek hoihzaw lai hi
A sisa-a suak naungek a kiman'na omlo hi. Khuamial sungah suakin, khuamial sung mahah mangthangin kiphawk nawnlo hi
Sun khuavak mukha loin, nuntakna bangci hiam, cih a theihkhakloh hangin tawlngakna a ngah hi buang hi
Nuntakna-ah nopsakna a ngahlo mipa kum tul nih a hing zongin, a tawpna-ah a sisa-a suak naungek mah tawh a tun'na mun kibang lel hi
Mihingte' nasepna pen a nektawm ding bek a ngaihsutna hilo napi-in, a khamkhop ngahzo tuanlo hi
Tua ahih manin mihaipa sangin mipilpa a hamphat zawkna bang om tuan ahi hiam? Mihaipa in nuntakna ding zia a theih hangin bang phatuam tuan ahi hiam
Na dangdang deihthuah ngitngetna sangin i neihsa teng tawh lungkimna hoihzaw hi. Hih zong a mawknapi, huihpi nungdelh mah tawh a kibang bek ahi hi
A piang thu khempeuh, a tuaci mahin tangtawnga kisehsa hi a, mi khat in amah sangin a thahatzaw mi khat a nial zawhlohna thu i vekpi-in i thei hi
Sauvei kinial lehang a mawkna hi semsem a, a phattuamna omlo hi
Nilim bangin a pai hanhan, a mawknapi hih nuntak tom sungah mihing-a' ding a hoihpen kua in thei ding ahi hiam? Ama sih khit ciangin leitungah bang piang ding cih kua in gen thei ahi hiam?
